meta.title: My Journey
meta.subtitle: Academic background, certifications, and continuous learning journey
meta.description: Detailed overview of formal education, professional experience, and projects that shaped my foundation as a software engineer and backend-focused full stack developer.

overview.headline: Full Stack Software Engineer | AI-Focused Backend Developer
overview.summary: Passionate Full Stack Software Engineer experienced in building scalable backend systems, normalized databases, AI-driven platforms, and modern web and mobile applications. Delivering complete software solutions end to end — from understanding client requirements and designing system architecture to building secure applications and deploying them on AWS cloud infrastructure.
overview.currentFocus: Scalable Backend Architecture, AWS Production Deployments, Frontend Performance & Structure. Currently exploring AI Engineering with a focus on LLMs, Generative AI, and intelligent systems.
overview.longTermGoal: Designing, building, and deploying complete software systems on the cloud with focus on backend systems, AI engineering, and cloud infrastructure.

custom.inspiration: Writing clean, maintainable code and delivering production-ready applications.

timeline.title: Primary and Secondary Schooling
timeline.subtitle: LKG to 10th
timeline.description: Primary and secondary schooling from LKG to 10th at Baroda High School, Alkapuri (2007 – 2019). Highly involved in NCC activities and gave my best in studies with true hard work and discipline, aimed a good score in academics as well as achieved a lot at national level.
activities: Indian Navy — NCC (National Cadet Corps) India
Marched in PM Delhi (Prime Minister) Rally
Head of Computer Department, BHS Alkapuri Higher Secondary Section

achievements.title: Gujarat Best Cadet
achievements.description: NCC ex-cadet; RDC (Republic Day Camp) Delhi 2018; PM (Prime Minister) Rally Delhi. Represented Gujarat Directorate of NCC, 2 Gujarat Naval Unit NCC.

reflection.learnings: Discipline and hard work in studies and national-level activities.

timeline.title: Diploma in Computer Science
timeline.subtitle: Computer Science and Engineering
timeline.description: Completed a diploma in Computer Science (Jan 2019 – Jun 2022). Built a solid foundation in programming, databases, and core engineering subjects.

achievements.title: Institute Topper (1st)
achievements.description: Sem 5th & 6th — 10 SPI. Inter-college Web Development Winner. Fireless Cooking Winner.

achievements.title: Inter College Web Development Winner
achievements.description: Biggest challenge was we had to code in notepad and we were not allowed to access internet. It was an amazing experience. I got to learn how to build a project in a certain time constraint environment.

reflection.challenges: Understanding abstract computer science concepts initially.
reflection.learnings: Strong fundamentals are non-negotiable for growth.

timeline.title: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.)
timeline.subtitle: Computer Science & Engineering

organization.name: The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda (MSU)

timeline.description: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering with a focus on backend development, system design, databases, and scalable application architecture. Sept 2022 – May 2025.

achievements.title: First class with distinction
achievements.description: Strong academic performance while working on backend-focused projects. Applied theoretical concepts to real-world software systems.

reflection.learnings: Theoretical concepts apply directly to real-world systems.

timeline.title: Android Developer Intern
timeline.subtitle: City Directory Android Application
timeline.description: Worked on an Android City Directory application with real-time maps and API integrations.
activities: Fetched and integrated data from company APIs
Built advanced splash screens using full-screen UI

achievements.title: Production-Ready Android UI
achievements.description: Implemented Material Design 3-based UI from Figma designs.

reflection.learnings: Delivered clean UI and handled complex integrations.

timeline.title: Vice President
timeline.subtitle: Code Vimarsh — Technical Community at MSU Baroda
timeline.description: Serving as Vice President, leading technical initiatives, mentoring students, and managing large-scale academic and community activities. A technical student-led community at The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda focused on technology, leadership, and community growth.
activities: Managed an executive board of 14+ members
Led a web development team of 30+ juniors

achievements.title: Large-Scale Student Leadership
achievements.description: Successfully guided and mentored hundreds of students through technical and career-focused initiatives.

reflection.challenges: Leading and inspiring large student communities.
reflection.learnings: Exceptional leadership and ability to inspire large student communities.

timeline.title: Software Development Engineer
timeline.subtitle: Keshav Encon Private Limited
timeline.description: Working as a Software Development Engineer building scalable systems from scratch, focusing on database normalization, backend architecture, and AI-powered applications. An enterprise-focused organization delivering scalable software solutions with strong emphasis on database architecture, backend systems, and real-world problem solving.
activities: Designed and implemented scalable databases following 3NF principles
Built backend systems from scratch enabling real-time data updates
Analyzed data fields from 50+ websites to design industry-standard schemas
Collaborated with team members to deliver production-grade solutions

achievements.title: AI Resume Platform at Scale
achievements.description: Designed and integrated a normalized database handling data from over 10,000 resumes using LLM-powered processing.

reflection.challenges: Taking ownership of end-to-end system reliability.
reflection.learnings: Built complex systems from scratch with strong architectural clarity and scalability.
